name: create_direct_upload
description: Create a direct upload URL that allows clients to upload video files directly to Mux without proxying through your server.

parameters.name: new_asset_settings
parameters.description: Settings for the asset that will be created from the upload. Controls playback policy, encoding tier, and more.

parameters.name: cors_origin
parameters.description: The origin URL allowed to make the upload request. Required for browser-based uploads.

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Number of seconds the upload URL is valid for. Default is 3600 (1 hour).
